name: How long do I have to fix a court filing that used wrong ChatGPT case law?
description: Act immediately via motion to amend.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to fix a court filing that used wrong ChatGPT case law?

acceptedAnswer.text: Act immediately via motion to amend.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: File a motion to withdraw or amend immediately, as courts expect prompt correction upon discovery.[2] No fixed timeline, but delay worsens sanctions risk.[2] Key factors: Prejudice to parties; good faith shown; jurisdiction rules. Notify opposing counsel; explain error source. Consult lawyer urgently.
